title: Node-linked embeddings (join key = graph id)
description: Vectors are stored outside Neo4j by default. Every row aligns with one graph node via (neo4j_label, id_property, node_id). The embedding_model_id + embedding_run_id reproduce the artifact. Phase 4 joins TextChunk.chunk_id (or Concept.concept_id, etc.) to rows in the bundle.

files: vectors.npz — NumPy compressed archive with arrays `embeddings` (float32) and `chunk_ids` (object string array), same length

join_key.id_property: Unique id property on that label, e.g. chunk_id
join_key.node_id: String value equal to the property on the node

versioning.embedding_model_id: HuggingFace or local model id (e.g. sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2)
versioning.corpus_version: corpus_v1 tag from JSONL records when applicable

implementations.language_model_env: COMP_LLM_DENSE_EMBEDDING_BUNDLE_DIR (with COMP_LLM_RETRIEVAL_BACKEND=dense and COMP_LLM_CORPUS_JSONL for citation text)
